description: Draws a 3D arc between two points around a center point. Unlike angle3d which measures angles, arc3d draws a curved path from point1 to point2 centered at a given point.
utility: Draw a curved arc in 3D space between two points around a center

arguments.name: center
arguments.description: Center point of the arc (point3d reference or inline)

arguments.name: arrowhead
arguments.description: Add arrowhead at start or end of arc

alternates.description: Arc from P1 to P2 around center

alternates.syntax: arc3d(G, center, P1, P2, arcsize(15), c(black), arrowhead(end), s(0.03))
alternates.description: Styled arc with custom size and arrowhead

examples.scenario: Azimuthal angle arc in spherical coordinate system (phi arc in xy-plane)
examples.expression:
pOrigin = point3d(G, 0, 0, 0)
pXAxis = point3d(G, 2, 0, 0, defer())
pYAxis = point3d(G, 0, 2, 0, defer())
phiArc = arc3d(G, pOrigin, pXAxis, pYAxis, arcsize(15), c(black), arrowhead(end), s(0.03), t(2))

C = point3d(G, 0, 0, 0)
A = point3d(G, 3, 0, 0)
B = point3d(G, 0, 3, 0)
arc = arc3d(G, C, A, B)
